race.comment: WILL IT SNOW (6) has a handy record around this circuit with a win and two seconds from five spins and has been racing very consistently this time in work. Gets some weight off with the 2kg claim and should run his usual honest race. The well-related GALWAY FLYER (7) (half to G2 winner Kirwan's Lane) finally shed the maiden tag at the latest effort and will have taken some confidence from that victory. Drawn to get all the favours from the inside alley and should be going very close again. VERMILION KIRIN (10) made it three unplaced runs from three starts this prep when fourth over 2240m at Doomben two-and-a-half weeks ago. Gets chance. KALKANLI (8) in the mix fresh.
